commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR restyles the ClawHub header, adds a Publishers nav item and responsive overflow/drawer/search states, changes the header logo asset, and updates header/UI design tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of src/components/Header.tsx at the PR head shows ArrowLeft and ArrowRight call preventDefault and toggle result tabs whenever the typeahead is open, which is enough to reproduce the blocked caret movement in a populated search input.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve the PR’s design work while fixing the introduced search keyboard regression and adding targeted coverage.

target.title: Polish ClawHub header and search UX
target.body: ## Summary - Aligns the ClawHub header with the proposed design direction: updated brand mark, Publishers navigation, responsive overflow menu, and a borderless homepage header over the full-bleed hero background. - Refines desktop search with Skills/Plugins tabs, keyboard hints, result navigation, a full-width search footer, and improved light-mode contrast. - Reworks the compact and mobile header with a stable logo/name lockup, search overlay, clear action, responsive typeahead, and a consistent navigation drawer. - Keeps appearance controls in the signed-in user menu, while moving the logged-out mobile selector into the drawer under a visible Theme label. - Compresses the header logo asset from 584 KB to 25 KB. ## Visual Proof All screenshots below were captured from this PR's final rebased head. The permanent [here.now gallery](https://woody-cherry-5pjp.here.now/) contains the complete set. ### Desktop header and homepage hero Proof of the brand mark, Publishers link, centered search, auth controls, borderless homepage header, and hero background extending behind the header. ![Desktop header and homepage hero](https://woody-cherry-5pjp.here.now/01-desktop-header-home.png) ### Desktop search typeahead Proof of the Skills/Plugins tab affordance, keyboard navigation hints, marketplace result icons, selected row treatment, and full-width search footer. ![Desktop search typeahead](https://woody-cherry-5pjp.here.now/02-desktop-search-typeahead.png) ### Narrow desktop overflow navigation Proof that Docs moves into the three-dot overflow menu while the remaining navigation, search, appearance control, and compact Sign in action stay available. ![Narrow desktop overflow navigation](https://woody-cherry-5pjp.here.now/03-responsive-more-menu.png) ### Mobile header Previously, the mobile header omitted the ClawHub logo and name, leaving only utility controls. This change keeps the ClawHub brand visible at every viewport while preserving the compact menu button, search trigger, and signed-out action. ### Mobile search overlay Proof that mobile search renders above page content, switches the header trigger to Close, exposes Clear only with input, and shows the responsive Skills/Plugins results panel. ### Mobile navigation drawer Proof of the complete mobile navigation and the logged-out Theme selector with all three appearance options and the selected state visible. ## Validation - `bun run ci:static` - `bun run ci:unit` - `bun run ci:types-build` - `bunx vitest run src/__tests__/header.test.tsx src/__tests__/ui-design-contract.test.ts` - `git diff --check upstream/main..HEAD`
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
